---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-banner}
# Curriculum Vitae
Download my full CV or browse the highlights below
:::

::: {.page-content}

[⬇ Download PDF](assets/JessicaBenun_CV.pdf){.cv-download}

::: {.cv-section}
## Education

::: {.cv-item}
::: {.cv-item-left}
### MS Business Analytics
Boston University
:::
[2025 – Present]{.cv-item-date}
:::

::: {.cv-item}
::: {.cv-item-left}
### BS Biology
Quinnipiac University
:::
[Graduated 2023]{.cv-item-date}
:::
:::

::: {.cv-section}
## Experience

::: {.cv-item}
::: {.cv-item-left}
### Project Accountant Lead
WSP — Building Structures Division
:::
[2026 – Present]{.cv-item-date}
:::

::: {.cv-item}
::: {.cv-item-left}
### Project Accountant
WSP
:::
[2023 – 2026]{.cv-item-date}
:::
:::

:::
